BusinessName.BusinessNameLine1Txt: JAY P WALKER CHARITABLE TRUST XXXXX0001

LiquidationExplanationStmt.ExplanationTxt: THE JAY P WALKER CHARITABLE TRUST TERMINATED ON 9/30/2018 AND DISTRIBUTED ITS REMAINING ASSETS TO BERKELEY HALL SCHOOL, YMCA OF GREATER TULSA, TULSA SPCA, HOLLAND HALL, TULSA BOYS HOME, YWCA TULSA, UNIVERSITY OF TULSA, AND PRINCIPIA CORP ON 5/14/2018. ASSETS DISTRIBUTED CONSISTED OF CASH OF $76,039.17.
